_comment: Add components to a project. Valid types: workflow, template, transformation, jsonForm, mopCommandTemplate, mopAnalyticTemplate. Reference is the component name or ID. Mode: 'move' removes from global scope, 'copy' keeps a copy in global scope. WARNING: move/copy re-prefixes names and changes _id but does NOT update internal references (childJob workflow refs, template names, transformation IDs). Safe pattern: create the project first, then build inside it.
